projects.name: Content Generator
projects.description: It was a SaaS application that helps users generate high-quality text (blog posts, marketing copy, social media) using AI. Users could input a topic or keywords, select tone and style, and receive AIgenerated drafts. Include features like revision history, SEO scoring.

projects.name: E-commerce recommendation system
projects.description: A prototype e-commerce site with a production-style recommendation system that blends collaborative ltering with semantic content embeddings and RAG-style retrieval. When a user views a product, the system uses user-item interaction data plus vector similarity over product descriptions/category/title to surface complementary and contextually relevant items. The result is a more personalized shopping experience that increases relevance of suggestions and can boost conversions and average order value.

projects.name: Chat Insite
projects.description: allowing ecient analysis and extraction of specic conversations from JSON data.

projects.name: AI Code Review Assistant
projects.description: AI Code Reviewer is a GitHub Action that automatically reviews pull requests using a large language model (LLM) (e.g. OpenAI, or any other provider via a BASE_URL). It analyzes the dis in a PR, detects bugs/style issues/improvements, and posts inline comments in the pull request. Its like having a senior reviewer that res whenever a PR is created or updated.

projects.name: Json to Mysql
projects.description: types, handles nested JSON structures, and ensures accurate mapping to MySQL schemas.

projects.name: Q&A Platform
projects.description: It is a intelligent Q&A chat system that ingests a companys documents (manuals, wikis, reports) and answers user queries. Use a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline to fetch relevant context from the knowledge basedatabricks.com. For example, the system can return answers grounded in up-to-date company data rather than generic model knowledge.

certifications.name: Certication in Web Development Project Completion

raw_text_sections.projects:
Content Generator Link NextJs, Langchain, QdrantDB, MongoDB, Cleark
It was a SaaS application that helps users generate high-quality text (blog posts, marketing
copy, social media) using AI. Users could input a topic or keywords, select tone and style, and receive
AIgenerated drafts. Include features like revision history, SEO scoring.
E-commerce recommendation system Link FastAPI, Qwik.js, GraphQL, Qdrant DB, MongoDB
A prototype e-commerce site with a production-style recommendation system that blends collaborative
ltering with semantic content embeddings and RAG-style retrieval. When a user views a product, the
system uses user-item interaction data plus vector similarity over product descriptions/category/title to
surface complementary and contextually relevant items. The result is a more personalized shopping
experience that increases relevance of suggestions and can boost conversions and average order value.
Chat Insite Link TypeScript, JavaScript, Nextjs
A tool to import WhatsApp group chat backups with advanced lters for username, date, and time,
allowing ecient analysis and extraction of specic conversations from JSON data.
AI Code Review Assistant Link JavaScript, GitHub Actions
AI Code Reviewer is a GitHub Action that automatically reviews pull requests using a large language
model (LLM) (e.g. OpenAI, or any other provider via a BASE_URL). It analyzes the dis in a PR,
detects bugs/style issues/improvements, and posts inline comments in the pull request. Its like having a
senior reviewer that res whenever a PR is created or updated.
Json to Mysql Link Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, HTML,Reactjs
Created a utility tool that converts JSON data into MySQL table format. It supports various data
types, handles nested JSON structures, and ensures accurate mapping to MySQL schemas.
Q&A Platform Link NextJs, Langchain, Redis, QdrantDB, MongoDB
It is a intelligent Q&A chat system that ingests a companys documents (manuals, wikis,
reports) and answers user queries. Use a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline to fetch relevant
context from the knowledge basedatabricks.com. For example, the system can return answers grounded
in
up-to-date company data rather than generic model knowledge.
